arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta's 'MISSING LINK' revealed by Paul Merson
arts.sum: Ahead of Arsenal ’s crucial Premier League clash against Chelsea, Merson admitted that his former club should’ve signed Isak during the most recent summer transfer window. Arsenal legend Paul Merson believes Alexander Isak is the “missing link” for his former side as the Gunners continue to search for a new number nine.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Arsenal quiz: Which player leads each category?
arts.sum: Chelsea host Arsenal in the Premier League with the two London clubs level on points after 10 games - but which of their players come out on top?

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Declan Rice makes 'unbelievable' Moises Caicedo and Chelsea comment
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Declan Rice has praised Chelsea's Moises Caicedo for his 'unbelievable' form in the Premier League this season. One of Chelsea's standout performers this season has been Caicedo, who joined the club for a record-breaking £115m back in the summer of 2023.

arts.ttl: Chelsea to rival Arsenal for Ligue 1 wonderkid
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are reportedly among the clubs interested in signing Lille teenager Ayyoub Bouaddi in 2025. The 17-year-old is being monitored by a host of top European clubs after an impressive start to the new campaign and he is set to be involved in a transfer tug-of-war next summer.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Chelsea take on Arsenal at Stamford Bridge
arts.sum: VAR chalked Kai Havertz's strike against his old club off in the first half. ESPN has updates

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Arsenal team news: Palmer + Odegaard start
arts.sum: The line-ups from the final match of Gameweek 11 The post Chelsea v Arsenal team news: Palmer + Odegaard start appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Huge Arsenal boost as key duo return for Chelsea clash
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta was able to name a full strength lineup for Saturday’s trip to Chelsea as Martin Odegaard made his long awaited return to the starting XI. The Norwegian has been sidelined since September after picking up an injury while on international duty and the team’s form has slumped in his absence. The […] The post Huge Arsenal boost as key duo return for Chelsea clash first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. Arsenal: Odegaard, Rice to start in derby
arts.sum: Martin Ødegaard and Declan Rice have been named in Arsenal's starting lineup for Sunday's clash against Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca sends 'domination' warning to Chelsea's rivals as squad claim made ahead of Arsenal
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca has fired a warning to their Premier Leagu e rivals as he believes the team will dominate English football for a number of years. After Chelsea's positive start to the season, Maresca admitted it's an exciting time for the club.

arts.ttl: Things spotted in Arsenal training including Rice hint and Odegaard reality
arts.sum: Arsenal and Mikel Arteta have been preparing for a return to Premier League action for the last few days, with eyes on a trip to Stamford Bridge to take on Chelsea. In what is a massive boost to Arsenal, club captain Martin Odegaard returned to action against Inter in the Champions League.
